items.briefing:
The Australian Government has launched its Horizon 2 action plan, the next phase of Australia's national cyber security strategy. This signals continued investment in cyber resilience across the country, and organisations should expect updated guidance and compliance expectations in the coming months. Separately, Scamwatch has flagged a rise in food delivery scams targeting Australians — these typically involve fake order confirmations or fraudulent refund requests designed to steal payment details.

Global research also shows phishing attack volumes have dropped 20%, but attacks are becoming more sophisticated and harder to spot. Staff should remain cautious with any unexpected emails or messages, even if they look legitimate.

**Tip:** If you receive an unexpected food delivery message asking you to click a link or confirm payment, go directly to the official app or website instead.

featured.title: Government launches Horizon 2 action plan for Australia’s cyber security strategy
featured.quote: Australia's government launches Horizon 2 cyber security strategy, setting national priorities for protecting critical infrastructure and citizens.
